creator: gena@optimal.odessa.ua
text:
In 9.0 RELEASE amd64 PS/2 mouse doesn't appear when PS/2 keyboard
disconnected (USB kbd used). No matter GENERIC or cvs-updated/built
kernel or liveCD boot. With 8.1 RELEASE kernel, Ubuntu 10.04LTS,
OpenSuse 11.4, WinXP all OK on the same machine.

When PS/2 kbd attached - all OK. I'd try different mices too. M/board
INTEL  DG965SS, CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM)2 CPU 6600  @ 2.40GHz (2397.65-MHz
K8-class CPU).

How-To-Repeat: This problem appears each time I boot FreeBSD 9.0 RELEASE/amd64
